title: How a man of faith governs himself before he leads anyone else
caption:
Most men want to lead something.
Very few learn to lead themselves first.

Self-mastery isn't earned by grinding harder. It's what grows when Christ actually has hold of you — and you let that show up in the small, daily stuff nobody sees.

Start there.

#discipline #christianmen #godlymanhood #faithanddiscipline #selfmastery #ethos
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
